ddls:
CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of the device (e.g., embedded system, sensor) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the device was installed */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the device (e.g., factory, vehicle) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the device (e.g., active, inactive, maintenance) */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Unique serial number for each device */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the device manufacturer */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model number of the device */,
  "warranty_expiration" TEXT /* Date when the device's warranty expires */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance performed on the device */,
  "maintenance_interval" INTEGER /* Interval (in days) for regular maintenance */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* Current maintenance status (e.g., due, completed, not required) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contexts" (
  "context_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each context */,
  "context_name" TEXT /* Name of the context (e.g., HK_CONTEXT_CONFIG, HK_CONTEXT_ANALOG) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the context */,
  "context_type" TEXT /* Type of context (e.g., hardware, software, environmental) */,
  "context_version" TEXT /* Version of the context definition */,
  "description_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the context */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("context_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configuration_parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration parameter */,
  "context_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the context of the parameter */,
  "param_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter (e.g., HWREV, FWREV_MAJ) */,
  "param_description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Access type of the parameter (e.g., R, RW) */,
  "data_size" TEXT /* Size of the parameter data */,
  "param_type" TEXT /* Type of parameter (e.g., integer, float, string) */,
  "min_value" TEXT /* Minimum value for the parameter */,
  "max_value" TEXT /* Maximum value for the parameter */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value for the parameter */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if the parameter is required */,
  "validation_rule" TEXT /* Rule for parameter validation (e.g., regex pattern) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_contexts" (
  "device_context_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device-context link */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "context_id" INTEGER /* ID of the context */,
  "context_status" TEXT /* Status of the context (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "context_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the context for the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_context_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_contexts_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_contexts_context_id FOREIGN KEY ("context_id") REFERENCES contexts ("context_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_parameters" (
  "param_value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter value */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "param_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the value was recorded */,
  "param_status" TEXT /* Status of the parameter (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "param_units" TEXT /* Units of measurement for the parameter value */,
  "param_source" TEXT /* Source of the parameter value (e.g., sensor, manual input) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_parameters_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_parameters_param_id FOREIGN KEY ("param_id") REFERENCES configuration_parameters ("param_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "firmware_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each firmware version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number (e.g., 1.0.0) */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the firmware was released */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Changelog for the firmware version */,
  "build_number" INTEGER /* Build number of the firmware */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the firmware version (e.g., released, deprecated) */,
  "is_critical" INTEGER /* Indicates if the firmware version is critical */,
  "supported_devices" TEXT /* List of supported device types or models */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_firmware" (
  "device_firmware_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device-firmware link */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the firmware version */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the firmware was installed on the device */,
  "installation_status" TEXT /* Status of the firmware installation (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "installation_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the firmware installation */,
  "installation_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who installed the firmware */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_firmware_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_firmware_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_firmware_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES firmware_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_firmware_installation_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("installation_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., critical, warning) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message of the alert */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was generated */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "alert_source" TEXT /* Source of the alert (e.g., hardware, software) */,
  "alert_resolution" TEXT /* Resolution steps for the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, engineer, technician) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the device was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, modify) */,
  "access_status" TEXT /* Status of the access (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of the log (e.g., info, error, debug) */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message of the log */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log was generated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user involved in the log event */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device involved in the log event */,
  "log_source" TEXT /* Source of the log (e.g., device, user) */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Level of the log (e.g., info, error, debug) */,
  "log_location" TEXT /* Location where the log event occurred */,
  "log_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the log event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the metric (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_status" TEXT /* Status of the metric (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "metric_source" TEXT /* Source of the metric (e.g., sensor, API) */,
  "metric_units" TEXT /* Units of measurement for the metric value */,
  "metric_threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_metrics_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status entry */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the device (e.g., active, inactive, maintenance) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the status was last updated */,
  "status_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the current status */,
  "status_source" TEXT /* Source of the status update (e.g., automated, manual) */,
  "status_change_type" TEXT /* Type of status change (e.g., maintenance, firmware update) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_status_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "note" TEXT /* Note or comment about the device */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the note was added */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the note */,
  "note_type" TEXT /* Type of note (e.g., maintenance, issue, update) */,
  "note_status" TEXT /* Status of the note (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "note_resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the note or issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_notes_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_notes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., firmware update, configuration change) */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the change was made */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "history_type" TEXT /* Type of history entry (e.g., firmware update, configuration change) */,
  "history_status" TEXT /* Status of the history entry (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  "history_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the history entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_history_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)
